content: infobox-table td Lek Viriyaphan เล ก ว ร ยะพ นธ Lek Viriyaphan at the young age Born 1914 Sampeng , Bangkok , Thailand Died November 17, 2000 2000-11-17 aged 85 86 Bangkok , Thailand Occupation Businessman Spouse Prapai Viriyaphan Lek Viriyaphan Thai : เล ก ว ร ยะพ นธ , sometimes referred to as Khun Lek ; 1914 17 November 2000 was an eccentric Thai businessman, millionaire and patron of culture responsible for the construction of Ancient Siam , Erawan Museum and Sanctuary of Truth
